scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd apps/control build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/control typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test && bun run --cwd apps/control test
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
